data.title: Midas Resumes Standard Operations for mToken Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
Midas has announced the gradual resumption of standard minting and redemption operations for all mTokens. According to Foresight News, the company expects all issuance and redemption activities to return to normal by the end of the day, pending further communication with Aave and KelpDAO.

Earlier, Midas halted the LayerZero OFT cross-chain service at 5:15 today (22:15 Central European Time yesterday) due to the impact of the rsETH incident. This action was part of a standard response protocol to address market fluctuations and protect user interests. Midas stated that it will continue to monitor the situation and provide updates through official channels.

data.title: Bitcoin's Profit Divergence Signals Potential Market Shift
data.description:
On April 19, on-chain analyst Murphy noted a divergence between Bitcoin's price action and realized profits. According to BlockBeats, after Bitcoin reached $78,000, the 24-hour average realized profit was $39.15 million, which is less than when Bitcoin hit $76,000 on April 14. This divergence often indicates that the demand side may not sustain further concentrated profit-taking, suggesting a potential decline in upward momentum, similar to patterns observed on January 7 and January 14. The reduced trading volume over the weekend could also be a contributing factor.

If the divergence is primarily due to the demand side's inability to handle more concentrated profit-taking, it could signal that the rebound has peaked. However, if the weekend's decreased market activity is the main cause, further observation in the coming trading days is necessary.

data.title: 8.253 million Trumps transferred from BitGo escrow wallet to OKX
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, 8.253 million TRUMPs (US$23.44 million) were transferred from the BitGo custodial wallet to OKX 10 minutes ago. Tracing back, these TRUMPs originated from a transfer from the team wallet two months ago.

data.title: Lotus Technology Explores Integration of Crypto and Smart Mobility
data.description:
At the 'Crypto 2026: From Cryptocurrency to Smart Economy' forum in Hong Kong, Lotus Technology Inc. CFO Dr. Daxue Wang delivered a keynote speech on the integration of cryptocurrency with the real economy.

According to ChainCatcher, Dr. Wang emphasized that smart mobility is a pioneering vehicle for the smart economy. Lotus, a luxury electric vehicle brand with a 78-year history and listed on Nasdaq, is actively exploring the deep integration of crypto technology with the real economy. He outlined three main directions for this integration.

Firstly, the protection of data value through blockchain's immutable and privacy-preserving features, allowing users absolute control over their personal data and enabling trustworthy data circulation and value exchange. Secondly, the release of asset value by exploring efficient circulation and fair trading of assets such as vehicle sales, brand value, intelligent driving technology patents, and global sales networks through Real World Assets (RWA), while also promoting the credible traceability of green travel carbon assets. Thirdly, the co-creation of ecological value by recording driving, charging, and maintenance data through on-chain smart nodes, enabling users to transition from 'car owners' to 'participants in the brand ecosystem.'

Dr. Wang noted the current challenges, including compliance implementation, technology adaptation, and ecosystem co-construction, but highlighted the opportunities in open collaboration to make smart mobility a tangible scenario in the smart economy. Lotus aims to collaborate with the crypto ecosystem to achieve the vision of transitioning from purchasing a Lotus car to sharing in the growth value of Lotus Technology.

data.title: Spark's Head of Strategy: ETH Market Faces Liquidity Risk Due to Potential 10-15% Cut in rsETH Loans
data.description: Spark's Head of Strategy, monetsupply.eth, stated in an article on the X platform that the situation is entering a more dangerous phase as the stablecoin market begins to lack liquidity. He believes that approximately 16.5% of the ETH market is backed by rsETH. If rsETH-backed loans suffer losses across the mainnet and external chains, emode could face a 10% to 15% slashing, leaving 2% to 3% for ETH suppliers to smooth out the umbrella structure. ETH suppliers naturally tend to exit as quickly as possible to avoid this risk, thus locking utilization at 100%. Lending rates are insufficient to incentivize repayment of unrelated LST cycles (wstETH, weETH) to release liquidity. Because ETH cannot be withdrawn, users who borrowed stablecoins like USDT and used ETH as collateral cannot close their positions even when stablecoin lending rates rise, cutting off a typical incentive mechanism for maintaining market health. Two unhealthy incentives are currently causing market utilization to lock at 100%: 1) ETH holders are unable to close positions to maintain a healthy LTV, and liquidators are unable to atomically withdraw or sell collateral, potentially leading to bad debts due to a drop in ETHUSD price. 2) Users supplying USDT tend to maximize borrowing of other stablecoins to exit their holdings; this position is currently generating positive returns (temporarily), thus the exit cost is low; if conditions worsen, at least 75% of the position value can be recovered. The bottom line is that these pooled/re-staking lending markets must maintain liquidity at all costs to function properly. The recent reduction in Aave's maximum lending rate by Slope2 is having a negative impact and significantly increases the risk of cascading market failure.

data.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker: We are prepared for both diplomatic and military confrontation.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency on the 19th, Iranian Parliament Speaker Qassem Ghalibaf said that Tehran is actively engaged in diplomatic activities while also preparing for military confrontation. He emphasized that Iran distrusts its adversaries and is prepared for any war. (Xinhua)

data.title: Hyperwave Suspends LayerZero Bridging Amid Security Concerns
data.description: On April 19, Hyperwave, a DeFi project within the Hyperliquid ecosystem, announced its active monitoring of the Kelp rsETH incident. According to BlockBeats, the project is collaborating closely with security partners to safeguard Hyperwave assets from any potential impact. As a precautionary measure, Hyperwave has temporarily suspended all asset bridging via LayerZero.

data.title: Security Tightened in Islamabad Amid U.S. Personnel Arrival
data.description:
Security measures have been heightened in Islamabad, Pakistan's capital, on April 19. According to BlockBeats, several shops have closed, and traffic has been partially restricted. Enhanced security forces have been deployed around several hotels in the area. 

Sources indicate that three aircraft carrying U.S. personnel landed at the Nur Khan Airbase. Shops along the roads connecting Islamabad and the Nur Khan Airbase have been shut down, and military and police presence has increased around key hotels in the city. 

Guests at the Serena Hotel, the site of previous U.S.-Iran negotiations, and the nearby Marriott Hotel have been advised to check out on the same day.

data.title: AltLayer Token Unlock Scheduled for April 26
data.description: AltLayer (ALT) is set to unlock approximately 246.59 million tokens on April 26 at 8:00 AM UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token unlock is part of the scheduled release by the Web3 asset data platform RootData. The value of the unlocked tokens is estimated to be around $1.77 million.

data.title: Sahara to Unlock 72.4 Million Tokens on April 26
data.description: Sahara (SAHARA) is set to unlock approximately 72.4 million tokens on April 26 at 00:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the scheduled unlocks tracked by the Web3 asset data platform, RootData.

data.title: U.S.-Iran Talks May Occur Before Friday Amid Increased Activity in Pakistan
data.description: Two U.S. C-17 aircraft have reportedly landed at Nur Khan Air Base in Pakistan, indicating potential U.S.-Iran discussions before Friday. According to NS3.AI, Pakistani security sources have noted increased activity, including road closures toward Islamabad's Red Zone and hotel evacuations near the anticipated meeting location.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Guotou Silver LOF to Suspend Trading Temporarily
data.description: Guotou Silver LOF will temporarily suspend trading starting from April 20, 2026, until 10:30 on the same day. According to Jin10, the suspension will not affect redemption services, which will continue as usual during this period. Trading will resume at 10:30 on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Bitget's IPO Prime preSPAX subscription has exceeded $100 million.
data.description: According to official sources, Bitget's IPO Prime preSPAX, the first phase of its offering, opened for subscription yesterday at 2:00 PM (UTC+8). The number of participants has reached 7,649, with total subscriptions exceeding $100,071,646 USD. More details can be found on the official Bitget platform.

data.title: Gate has launched ASTEROID perpetual contract trading.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate has now launched ASTEROID perpetual contract trading (USDT settlement), supporting leverage from 1x to 20x.

data.title: Pakistani sources: US-Iran talks may be held before Friday.
data.description: According to Al Jazeera, two Pakistani security sources indicated that negotiations between the United States and Iran are likely to take place before Friday. The sources stated their assessment was based on several factors: two U.S. heavy transport planes (C-17 Globemaster IIIs) have landed at the Nur Khan Air Base in Rawalpindi, near Islamabad, the Pakistani capital. Furthermore, roads leading from the airport to Islamabad's Red Zone have been temporarily closed, indicating escalated security measures. Finally, the sources stated that the Serena Hotel and Marriott Hotel in Islamabad are checking out guests and will not accept new bookings before Friday. The Serena Hotel is the venue for the first round of U.S.-Iran talks on April 11. (Jinshi)

data.title: Alchemy Pay Unveils Alchemy Chain to Connect Fiat and Crypto Economies
data.description: At the 'Crypto 2026: From Cryptocurrency to Smart Economy' forum held in Hong Kong, Alchemy Pay's ecosystem lead, Arda Senoz, delivered a keynote speech titled 'Bridging the Fiat and Crypto Global Economies.' According to ChainCatcher, Senoz highlighted the launch of Alchemy Chain, which aims to streamline settlement processes between wallets, merchants, and payment partners. The ACH token will serve as the gas fee, incentive, and governance tool on the chain. The technical roadmap outlines key milestones, including the implementation of payment core and ACH fee settlement by Q4 2025, enhancement of liquidity and interoperability by Q1 2026, and the issuance of Alchemy Chain stablecoin along with the establishment of payment channels by Q2 2026. Senoz emphasized Alchemy Pay's commitment to compliance and security, leveraging innovative solutions like RWA integration to promote mainstream adoption of digital assets and achieve seamless connectivity between fiat and crypto economies.

data.title: Charles Schwab to Launch Direct Bitcoin and Ethereum Trading for Brokerage Clients
data.description: Charles Schwab is set to initiate a phased rollout of direct trading for Bitcoin and Ethereum among its 39 million brokerage clients in the coming weeks. According to NS3.AI, Schwab Crypto will initially support only these two cryptocurrencies and will impose a fee of 75 basis points per trade. Schwab has clarified that these digital assets are not considered deposits, are not insured by the FDIC or protected by SIPC, and carry the risk of total loss of principal.

data.title: Hackers Drain $300 Million from Cross-Chain Bridge, Impacting Crypto Platforms
data.description: Hackers exploited a cross-chain bridge on Saturday, resulting in the theft of nearly $300 million from a crucial piece of decentralized finance infrastructure. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significant impact this breach has had across multiple cryptocurrency platforms. The incident underscores the vulnerabilities within the crypto ecosystem, as cross-chain bridges are essential for transferring assets between different blockchain networks. This breach has raised concerns about the security measures in place to protect digital assets and the potential for further disruptions in the crypto market.

data.title: Justin Sun deposited the $125 million worth of ETH withdrawn from Aave into Spark.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the 53,660 ETH ($125 million) that Justin Sun urgently withdrew from Aave in the early hours of the morning were deposited into Spark half an hour ago. Currently, most of Justin Sun's on-chain funds, $2.13 billion, are held in Sky and Spark, with $380 million remaining on Aave.
